title: The all-you-can-eat eel standard, built by Bonga.
subtitle: From 2023 to today — zero franchise closures and stable revenue across the network.

pillars.title: Industry-low cost ratio
pillars.description: Direct supply from contracted farms locks in price competitiveness.

pillars.description: ~31% target operating margin at a standard store.

supply.title: One-stop supply chain
